review: I just have to start by saying, meeting Michele Foggin from Re/max south was truly a blessing. I had gone through 4 other realtors before i found this lovely lady. She recently helped my find my first home in here in Washington. I am a transplant from the east coast, and you can only imagine how hard it was to find a realtor who wasn't just trying to sell me just anything in my price range. She was accurate and caring, and didn't steer me in any wrong direction. I wish I could say the same for the other realtors I came in contact with. They were pushy and made me feel like I was rushing into my first home. Its simple, if you are looking to by a home anywhere in the Whatcom county area, Michele is your girl. I love my house!! It is perfect, and I wouldn't have purchased it without her. She did everything I asked and got everything I wanted. She's the best!!!!! 5 stars all the way!!!!!!I
